name: page-focus-guidance-brainstorm
title: brainstorm: page focus guidance
description: Brainstorm how to reduce visual overload and add clearer first-use guidance/focus for rich FableMap pages.
creator: lijin
notes: Brainstorm complete: 3 approaches (A: Focus Rail, B: Progressive Disclosure, C: Guided Tour) compared. Recommended Approach A (Product Focus Charter first) + one page proof slice. All acceptance criteria met.
